rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CHAD POTTER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANTS CHAD POTTER, KARL HAAS, ANN COOPER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged, including a complete cause of action for ejectment with associated request for damages. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BERTHA P PANG VS. DOUGLAS BAIRD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS BAIRD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for July 14, 2017. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDON EBERHART VS. MARIYA RUCHKA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Protective Order Modifying Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT MARIYA RUCHKA'S Motion For Protective Order Modifying Subpoena. Defendant's Motion for Protective Order Modifying Subpoena is transferred to department 301 to be heard on June 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. Courtesy copy of reply shall be delivered to department 301 no later than June 7, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEEUN KIM VS. JON WILLARD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT JON WILLARD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED. Request for Attorney's fees is stricken. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEEUN KIM VS. JON WILLARD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT JON WILLARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) attach the missing exhibit; (2) to allege facts in good faith to support all elements of breach of oral contract in light of the Statute of Frauds and Secrest v. Security Nat. Mortg. Loan Trust 2002-2 (2008) 167 Cal.App.4th 544; (3) to allege facts in good faith to support all elements of promissory fraud; (4) to re-plead unjust enrichment as remedy. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PUI YING WONG PON VS. DOUGLAS KIP WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 6, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS WONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendant providing a letter/declaration from his physician linking his failure to timely respond to his medical condition/medication no later than 9:00 a.m. on June 6, 2017 (lack of medical evidence pointed out in opposition filed on May 19, 2017) and (2) paying $1,154 to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order; and (3) filing an answer no later than June 6, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/REQ)
